admission_summary: Admitted for explicit opt-in runtime automatic include_l0 implementation only. Default behavior must remain unchanged and automatic include_l0 must not be default-on.
completion_summary: Completed explicit opt-in runtime automatic L0 discovery inclusion. Default context construction remains unchanged; automatic L0 inclusion requires explicit opt-in, is deterministic, capped, deduplicated, and uses existing L0 discovery advisor diagnostics without live retrieval, embeddings, index mutation, memory mutation, reranking, or global provider prompt template changes.
constraints: Proposal only: no implementation is admitted by this PLAN record.
Default runtime behavior must remain unchanged.
Automatic include_l0 may run only when explicitly enabled.
Use only existing L0 discovery advisor diagnostics; do not add live retrieval.
No vector index or document index mutation.
No provider prompt template changes outside the explicit opt-in context path.
Deduplicate suggestions against already selected context items.
Apply a small deterministic cap to automatically included L0 chunks.
Do not close GAP-0001 unless opt-in runtime behavior is implemented, tested, and documented.
Do not make automatic include_l0 default-on in this slice.
next_action: If admitted, inspect the context construction path and implement opt-in automatic include_l0 with tests.
non_goals: Do not make automatic include_l0 default-on.
Do not add embeddings or index mutation.
Do not change provider prompt templates globally.
Do not close GAP-0001 in the proposal/admission step.
objective: Implement real runtime automatic include_l0 behavior behind an explicit opt-in control, using the now-threshold-approved deterministic L0 discovery advisor evidence.
proposed_change: Wire L0 discovery advisor suggestions into runtime context construction when an explicit opt-in flag or configuration path is enabled. Default behavior must remain unchanged. Inclusion must be deterministic, capped, deduplicated, and sourced only from existing advisor diagnostics.
rationale: PLAN-20260707-0004 expanded the deterministic evidence corpus to 12 clean manifests.
The PLAN-20260707-0003 threshold review now passes all gates for the expanded corpus.
GAP-0001 remains open because runtime automatic include_l0 is still unimplemented.
The next useful slice should exercise real runtime behavior, but keep the default path unchanged until opt-in behavior is tested.
risk: Automatic context inclusion can silently alter prompt content, token usage, and response behavior. The risk is controlled by keeping default behavior unchanged, requiring explicit opt-in, deduping, capping, and testing both disabled and enabled paths.
scope: Runtime opt-in wiring only: deterministic inclusion from existing L0 discovery advisor diagnostics into context construction when explicitly enabled.
success_criteria: A runtime option exists to enable automatic include_l0 from L0 discovery advisor diagnostics.
With the option disabled, existing context construction output remains unchanged.
With the option enabled, eligible advisor-suggested L0 chunks are included deterministically.
Inclusion is capped and stable in order.
No live retrieval, embedding creation, index mutation, memory mutation, reranking, or provider prompt template mutation is introduced.
Tests cover disabled/default behavior and enabled opt-in behavior.
SELF_MODEL and tests are updated to record the proposed runtime activation slice.
summary: Propose the first runtime activation slice for GAP-0001: explicit opt-in automatic include_l0 from deterministic advisor diagnostics, with default behavior unchanged.
title: Add opt-in runtime automatic L0 discovery inclusion
